canonical_name: Dr. Khubchand Baghel Swasthya Sahayata Yojana (Chhattisgarh)

local_names.hi: डॉ. खूबचंद बघेल स्वास्थ्य सहायता योजना (छत्तीसगढ़)
local_names.bn: ড. খুবচাঁদ বাঘেল স্বাস্থ্য সাহায্য যোজনা (ছত্তিসগড়)
local_names.ta: டாக்டர் குப்சந்த் பகேல் சுவாஸ்த்ய சகாயதா யோஜனா (சத்தீஸ்கர்)
local_names.te: డా. ఖుబ్‌చంద్ బఘేల్ స్వాస్థ్య సహాయతా యోజన (ఛత్తీస్‌గఢ్)
local_names.mr: डॉ. खूबचंद बघेल स्वास्थ्य सहाय्यता योजना (छत्तीसगड)
local_names.gu: ડૉ. ખૂબચંદ બઘેલ સ્વાસ્થ્ય સહાયતા યોજના (છત્તીસગઢ)
local_names.kn: ಡಾ. ಖೂಬ್‌ಚಂದ್ ಬಘೇಲ್ ಸ್ವಾಸ್ಥ್ಯ ಸಹಾಯತಾ ಯೋಜನೆ (ಛತ್ತೀಸ್‌ಗಢ್)
local_names.ml: ഡോ. ഖൂബ്‌ചന്ദ് ബഘേൽ സ്വാസ്ഥ്യ സഹായതാ യോജന (ഛത്തീസ്ഗഡ്)
local_names.pa: ਡਾ. ਖੂਬਚੰਦ ਬਘੇਲ ਸਿਹਤ ਸਹਾਇਤਾ ਯੋਜਨਾ (ਛੱਤੀਸਗੜ੍ਹ)
local_names.or: ଡ. ଖୁବଚନ୍ଦ ବଘେଲ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ସହାୟତା ଯୋଜନା (ଛତ୍ତିସଗଡ଼)

income_thresholds.description: Two-tier system: Tier 1 (Rs 5 lakh) for Priority/Antyodaya ration card holders; Tier 2 (Rs 50,000) for all other ration card holders in Chhattisgarh. No direct income ceiling — eligibility is ration card category based.

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Chhattisgarh are eligible
Must hold a valid ration card issued in Chhattisgarh. Ration card category determines coverage tier.
Families covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded
Income tax paying families are excluded from Tier 1 (Rs 5 lakh) but may access Tier 2 (Rs 50,000) with valid ration card

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in Chhattisgarh ration card. All members listed on the ration card are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Chhattisgarh Ration Card
required_documents.notes: Must be valid CG ration card. Priority/Antyodaya card = Rs 5 lakh tier. Other ration cards = Rs 50,000 tier. This is MANDATORY.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Lok Seva Kendra)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at dkbssy.cg.nic.in with Aadhaar or ration card number
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card and Chhattisgarh ration card
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies ration card category (Priority/Antyodaya for Tier 1, others for Tier 2)
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded
Step 6: DKBSSY card generated with appropriate coverage tier
Step 7: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in CG for cashless treatment
description_for_embedding: Dr. Khubchand Baghel Swasthya Sahayata Yojana (DKBSSY) is Chhattisgarh's state health insurance scheme with a unique two-tier coverage structure. Tier 1 provides Rs 5 lakh per family per year for Priority and Antyodaya ration card holders. Tier 2 provides Rs 50,000 per family per year for all other ration card holders. Named after Dr. Khubchand Baghel, the first Chief Minister of CG. All CG ration card holders are eligible — the ration card category determines the coverage tier. Covers hospitalization, surgery, and medical treatment at empanelled hospitals. Enrollment via dkbssy.cg.nic.in or CSC.
